summary.dashboardOverview: Security / Settings content moved into Overview, dashboard top header hidden, Home link added to sidebar, Roblox verification layout widened.
summary.privacyReveal: Masked username/email rows now have reveal buttons. Full values are only shown after local click and are not logged.
summary.billing: Billing page changed to subscription/renewal/cancellation help; product license cards remain in My Products.
summary.referrals: Referral reward copy and backend reward days changed from 15 days to 7 days.
summary.howToGetKey: How-to-get-key page converted to compact modal-style guide with close button and friendlier copy direction.
summary.successSync: Checkout success polling extended and fallback now opens My Products instead of blocking the button when the key is still syncing.
summary.appLocalQa: Local QA app exported to owner desktop folder with signed fima.integrity.json so the manifest-missing startup error is avoided.

verification.backendSyntax: node --check passed for public/assets/js/account.js, public/assets/js/success.js, src/server.js
verification.ownerFolderSmoke: FimaMacroStudio.exe started from owner folder and stayed alive after 7 seconds

paths.ownerOpenCommand: C:\Users\PC\Desktop\Fieel icin Fima Macro Son sürüm\Open FIMA MACRO.cmd
